items.title: How GitHub Is Securing Agentic Workflows in Modern CI CD Systems
items.summaryShort: How GitHub Is Securing Agentic Workflows in Modern CI CD Systems. GitHub detailed a defense-in-depth security architecture for agentic workflows in CI/CD pipelines, focusing on isolation, constrained execution, and auditability.

items.title: Presentation: Leadership in AI-Assisted Engineering
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Leadership in AI-Assisted Engineering. Justin Reock discusses the reality of AI’s impact on engineering, moving past anecdotes to hard data from DORA and DX research.

items.title: Cloudflare Launches “Artifacts” Beta, Introducing Git-Like Versioning for AI Agents

items.title: Article: Implementing the Sidecar Pattern in Microservices-based ASP.NET Core Applications
items.summaryShort: Article: Implementing the Sidecar Pattern in Microservices-based ASP.NET Core Applications. Today's applications require monitoring, logging, configuration, etc.

items.title: Podcast: The AI Joy Gap: Why Some Developers Thrive While Others Struggle
items.summaryShort: Podcast: The AI Joy Gap: Why Some Developers Thrive While Others Struggle. In this podcast, Shane Hastie, Lead Editor for Culture & Methods, spoke to Michael Parker, VP of Engineering at TurinTech AI, about bringing joy back to software dev

items.title: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no.
items.summaryShort: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no..

items.title: San Francisco's housing market has lost its mind
items.summaryShort: San Francisco's housing market has lost its mind. The invisible force behind all of this is no mystery to anyone paying attention to the city's tech economy.

items.title: Prime Video follows Netflix and Disney by adding a TikTok-like ‘Clips' feed in its app
items.summaryShort: Prime Video follows Netflix and Disney by adding a TikTok-like ‘Clips' feed in its app. The Clips feed aims to enable discovery by offering users a scrollable feed with short snippets of shows and movies.
